problem id: ee7ce543
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00010011 -> 10010001
  11100100 -> 01010010
  11010011 -> 11110001
  10101010 -> 00000101
  01011001 -> 11100100
  00000101 -> 00101010
  11011011 -> 10110101
  00110110 -> 10101011
  11101001 -> 00111100
  10111011 -> 10000101

query: 00000110
predicted answer: 00110011
